steps.title: Calculate attendees of first and second webinars
steps.content: 65% of the 2,000 first-webinar attendees also attended the second webinar: $$0.65 \times 2,000 = 1,300$$

steps.title: Calculate attendees of first webinar only (not second)
steps.content: Subtract those who attended both from the total first-webinar attendees: $$2,000 - 1,300 = 700$$

steps.title: Calculate attendees of first and third but not second
steps.content: Of the 700 people who attended first but not second, 31% attended the third webinar: $$0.31 \times 700 = 217$$
